description: Current vaccination and standard macrolide treatment.
modified_control_levers: Country-specific vaccine schedule and coverage; standard macrolide treatment and PEP assumptions.

description: Increase routine childhood vaccine coverage in the existing program.
interpretation_note: Tests marginal gains in high-coverage profiles; not evidence against maintaining routine childhood vaccination.

description: Add a school-age or adolescent booster.
modified_control_levers: Coverage update: adolescent_10_17y 0.90; VE_inf retained at 0.25.
interpretation_note: Program-extension scenario using the current aP-like mechanism rather than a new product profile.

description: Represent pregnancy Tdap-based infant protection through direct infant antibody protection, recent maternal/adult boosting, and cocooning.
modified_control_levers: Infant maternal-protection coverage: 0-2 m 0.72 and 3-11 m 0.78; young_adult_18_39y recent-boosting proxy 0.55; maternal VE_sus 0.55 and VE_sym 0.92; maternal protection duration 180 d; young-adult-to-infant contact reduction 30%.
interpretation_note: Composite proxy, not passive antibody protection alone; eTable 17 decomposes direct antibody, adult boosting, and cocooning components.

description: Isolate direct infant protection from transplacental antibody transfer.
modified_control_levers: Infant maternal-protection coverage: 0-2 m 0.72 and 3-11 m 0.78; maternal VE_sus 0.55 and VE_sym 0.92; maternal protection duration 180 d.
interpretation_note: Excludes adult boosting and cocooning to attribute the composite maternal-household scenario.

description: Isolate recent adult or maternal boosting that lowers infection and transmission risk in young adults.
interpretation_note: Excludes direct infant antibody protection and cocooning.

description: Isolate reduced mother-infant or household-to-infant transmission.
modified_control_levers: Young-adult-to-infant contact reduction 30% for infant_0_2m and infant_3_11m targets.
interpretation_note: Excludes direct infant antibody protection and adult boosting.

description: Use resistance-aware testing, alternative treatment, and restored PEP effectiveness for resistant infections.
modified_control_levers: Resistant infection updates: infectious-duration reduction 0.45 and infectiousness reduction 0.35; symptomatic treatment rate 0.065; resistant-strain PEP effectiveness 0.45.
interpretation_note: Depends on testing reach, uptake, treatment selection, and PEP implementation; near-term sensitivity is in eTable 16.

description: Represent an improved high-transmission-blocking pertussis vaccine profile.
modified_control_levers: Uses next_generation vaccine profile: VE_sus 0.80, VE_sym 0.90, VE_inf 0.65, VE_dur 0.40.
interpretation_note: Mechanistic upper-bound profile motivated by candidate mucosal or high-transmission-blocking platforms; pipeline mapping is in eTable 27.

interpretive_status: Mechanistic upper-bound package, not policy package
description: Combine transmission-blocking vaccine assumptions, maternal-household protection, adolescent boosting, and resistance-guided management.
modified_control_levers: Uses transmission_blocking vaccine profile; infant maternal-protection coverage 0.72/0.84; adolescent_10_17y coverage 0.90; young_adult_18_39y boosting proxy 0.55; maternal VE_sus 0.55 and VE_sym 0.92; maternal protection duration 180 d; young-adult-to-infant contact reduction 30%; resistance-guided treatment and resistant-strain PEP updates.
interpretation_note: Stress-test scenario for combined mechanisms; not an externally validated implementation package.
